name: Firecracker Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
2. In a bowl, stir together the melted butter, sugar, and vanilla extract. Add the eggs; beat well with a spoon.
3. Stir together the flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt. Gradually add this mixture to the egg mixture, beating until well blended. Stir in the chocolate chips and nuts (if desired). Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until the brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan. Allow to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack. Cut into bars. Yield: about 16 brownies.
